# Meridian Osteopathy — AI-search audit

**Report date:** 2026-05-08
**Run cadence:** weekly (Saturday)
**Generated by:** weekly-routine

---

## TL;DR

- **No items shipped this week.** Clean working tree since 2026-05-02 and zero commits in the last seven days. Backlog unchanged at 12 items pending: #12, #13, #14, #15, #16, #17, #21, #22, #23, #25, #26, #27. Tier-1 fixes #17 (acupuncture-page reframe) and #21 (Google Business Profile services audit) remain the two highest-leverage owner-shippable items that have now been pending for three full cycles.
- **Search visibility — third run, 30 queries:** Meridian still ranks 0 across every tracked query. Two notable SERP shifts to watch: 'medical acupuncture christchurch' pivoted from physio-dominated last week (Muscle People / Physiosouth) back to TCM acupuncturists this week (acuclinic / thehouseofacupuncture) — possibly geo personalisation noise rather than a permanent change. 'dry needling halswell' regressed from last week's Elite Physio Halswell appearance to ALL US-clinic results — the Halswell+modality SERP is now genuinely vacant of NZ-relevant content, sharpening the case for item #17 to explicitly mention Halswell when reframed.
- **Industry signals:** BrightEdge data (May 2026) shows Google AI Overviews now appear on 88% of healthcare queries — treatment/procedure queries hit 100% — and cut traditional CTR by 61% on health searches. Translation: ranking organically isn't enough; being citation-ready for AI answers matters more. Existing items #26 (head `<link rel='alternate'>`) and #27 (IndividualPhysician schema) directly target this. Reddit citation share on Perplexity holds at ~47% (Conductor / CMSWire data). Image-grounded retrieval is gaining weight in 2026 GEO guides — G14 (richer alt text) is more time-sensitive than its current Tier-3 framing implies.

## Search visibility — wins, losses and movement vs 2026-05-02

### Wins
- None. Meridian is not in the top 10 for any tracked query.

### Losses / competitor strengthening
- **back pain osteopath christchurch** — `betterhealthosteopathy.nz` now ranks with TWO URL variants on the same query (the dedicated /back-pain-relief-osteopath-christchurch/ page plus a second cluster URL). They've doubled down. Reinforces item #23.
- **best osteopath christchurch** — Better Health climbed to slot #1 (was outside top 3 last run).
- **osteopath christchurch** — Better Health climbed into top 3 (was outside top 5 last run); christchurchosteopath.co.nz still #1.

### Notable SERP shifts (mixed signals)
- **medical acupuncture christchurch** — pivoted from physio-dominated last week (Muscle People / Physiosouth / acupuncturechristchurch.com / acuphysio.co.nz / healthandsportcentral.co.nz) to TCM acupuncturist-dominated this week (acuclinic / thehouseofacupuncture / acucentre / acupuncturechch / theacupuncturist). Either reading still keeps Meridian invisible, but the SERP volatility on this exact query (the framing item #17 was meant to claim) is itself signal — Google has no settled view of who owns "medical acupuncture" in Christchurch.
- **dry needling halswell** — REGRESSED. Last week Elite Physio Halswell surfaced for the first time; this week ALL top-5 results are US clinics. Halswell+modality SERP is genuinely empty of NZ content. Item #17 should explicitly use the word "Halswell" in the reframed acupuncture intro.
- **osteopath hillmorton** — also regressed. Google now autocorrects to "Winchmore Hill" (UK) and returns no NZ results at all. Our actual location and we still have no Hillmorton signal beyond the footer line. Justifies a literal Hillmorton mention on a page (intro paragraph or a brief 'finding us' page).

### New entrants in tracked SERPs
- **paediatric osteopath christchurch** — `happyspine.co.nz/nina-hu` surfaces in top 3. That's our own acupuncturist's separate paediatric osteo profile, hosted off-site at a competitor address (164 Clarence St Riccarton, also Nikau Room's address). Worth flagging — internal duplication of authority that we're not capturing.
- **baby osteopath christchurch** — `porthillsosteo.co.nz` is a new entrant in top 5.
- **cranial osteopath christchurch** — `koruclinic.co.nz` and `canterburyosteopaths.co.nz` enter top 5.

### Indexing-lag tracking (pages shipped 2-3 weeks ago)
- `/conditions/sciatica/` (shipped ~3 weeks ago) — still not visible for "sciatica osteopath christchurch". If no movement by week 4, consider extra internal links and a dedicated H2 in the osteopathy service intro.
- `/conditions/headaches-migraines/` — still not visible for that query.
- `/conditions/pregnancy-back-pain/` — still not visible.
- `/conditions/sports-injury-recovery/` — still not visible.
- `/services/acupuncture/fertility/` — still not visible.

## Industry signals worth noting

| Source | Finding | Implication for Meridian |
|---|---|---|
| BrightEdge (May 2026) | AI Overviews appear on 88% of healthcare queries; 100% of treatment/procedure queries; CTR down 61% on health searches | Reinforces every AEO item in the backlog; ranking ≠ traffic any more |
| Conductor / CMSWire (May 2026) | Reddit ~47% of Perplexity citations, ~5% of ChatGPT citations | Item #15 (Reddit seeding) holds; updated stat in body |
| 2026 GEO guides | Image-grounded retrieval gaining weight in retrieval models | G14 (richer alt text) is more time-sensitive than Tier-3 |
| Schema.org v30 (2026-03-19) | IndividualPhysician + PhysiciansOffice + practicesAt added | Already in item #27 |
| llms.txt 2026 adoption guides | `<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">` is consensus best practice | Already in item #26 |
| TechCrunch (Jan 2026) | Google removed AI Overviews for some medical queries | Suggests medical YMYL queries get extra scrutiny — quality signals on our condition pages matter more |

No new industry findings this week trigger a wholly new punch-list item. Existing items collectively cover the surface area.

## Risks & blockers

- **Autocomplete fetch (suggestqueries.google.com) still blocked** by the routine host egress allowlist (confirmed via curl: "Host not in allowlist"). Self-expansion continues via `derived` queries only. Durable fix = widen the routine egress allowlist to include `suggestqueries.google.com` and `meridianosteopathy.co.nz`.
- **Three pages shipped 2-3 weeks ago still aren't surfacing** in tracked SERPs (sciatica, headaches-migraines, pregnancy-back-pain, sports-injury-recovery, acupuncture/fertility). Indexing lag is normal but worth flagging — by next week we should expect at least one to surface or we need to investigate.
- **Item #17 has been pending three cycles.** The acupuncture page reframe is small (single intro paragraph) and the Halswell+modality SERP just regressed, so the suburb gap is wider than ever. Worth nudging.
- **Item #21 has been pending three cycles.** GBP services audit is a 10-minute owner task off-site, blocking completion — cannot be auto-shipped.
